codeReview.summary: Pass. summary: Pass. This fix resolves the original scrutiny failure by moving ProofModule deferral behind a real client boundary and by adding runtime-oriented lazy-loading coverage for the proof wrapper instead of relying only on source-pattern checks. The only follow-up is a skill-adherence reporting mismatch in the worker handoff/transcript.
